title: Ukrainian Beef Skewers
description: A classic Ukrainian dish featuring marinated beef skewers grilled to perfection. Quick and easy to make, perfect for a summer evening.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, vodka, chopped onion, chopped bell pepper, and chopped garlic.
2. Add the beef strips to the marinade and mix well to coat.
3. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
5. Remove the beef from the marinade, letting any excess liquid drip off.
6. Thread the beef strips onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
7. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
8. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the beef is cooked to your desired level of doneness.
9. Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
10. Serve hot, with lemon juice on the side (if desired).
